originalTitle: Police fire shots in air to disperse angry crowds at DR Congo Ebola treatment centre
title: Police fire shots in air to disperse angry crowds at DR Congo Ebola treatment centre
content: Unrest between crowds trying to reclaim the bodies of suspected Ebola cases and authorities have continued.

originalTitle: Kenya police shake up president's protection team after security breach
title: Kenya police shake up president's protection team after security breach
content: A man managed to evade security and embrace William Ruto before being wrestled to the ground.

originalTitle: Senegal's leadership row mounts as parliament speaker resigns
title: Senegal's leadership row mounts as parliament speaker resigns
content: Some speculate that El Malick Ndiaye stepped down so that ousted-PM Ousmane Sonko can take his place.

originalTitle: Trump renews petition for White House ballroom, pointing to nearby shooting
title: Trump renews petition for White House ballroom, pointing to nearby shooting
content: The Trump administration has sought nearly $1bn in taxpayer funds to complete the ballroom project, citing security.

originalTitle: Czech police detain Russian priest over ‘white substance’ find
title: Czech police detain Russian priest over ‘white substance’ find
content: Moscow condemned the actions of the Czech police, calling the detainment a 'provocation'.

originalTitle: Israel to intensify Lebanon offensive to ‘crush’ Hezbollah
title: Israel to intensify Lebanon offensive to ‘crush’ Hezbollah
content: Prime Minister Netanyahu's order comes despite 'ceasefire' agreed with Lebanon last month, which was recently extended.

originalTitle: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
title: Deal with US not imminent, Iran says
content: The US secretary of state earlier said that an agreement could possibly come on Monday.

originalTitle: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
title: Oil prices slide on hopes of US-Iran peace deal
content: Trump said on Saturday that an agreement would include the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz, without giving further details.

originalTitle: Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes and tells foreign nationals to leave
title: Russia threatens more Kyiv strikes and tells foreign nationals to leave
content: It comes after the Ukrainian capital suffered one of the biggest aerial assaults of the war overnight on Saturday.

originalTitle: Jordan leads star names at Guardiola's leaving party
title: Jordan leads star names at Guardiola's leaving party
content: Basketball legend Michael Jordan leads the cast of star names to pay tribute to Pep Guardiola at the Manchester City manager's farewell party.

originalTitle: Man Utd captain Fernandes takes on Keane over 'lie'
title: Man Utd captain Fernandes takes on Keane over 'lie'
content: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes accuses Roy Keane of putting "words in my mouth" and says he has asked for the phone number of the club legend to set him straight.

originalTitle: Shaw signs new Man City deal after contract U-turn
title: Shaw signs new Man City deal after contract U-turn
content: Man City striker Khadija Shaw signs a new four-year contract with the club, just days after it looked like she would be leaving the WSL champions this summer.
